name: Summer Fruit Compote
recipeIngredient: 2 large Mangoes, peeled and cut into 3/4-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine sugar, rum, and lime juice.
2. Add mangoes and blueberries; toss to coat.
3. Cover and refrigerate if not serving right away.
Makes about 4 cups or 6 servings.
Each serving: About 85 calories, 1 g protein, 21 g carbohydrate, 0 g total fat, 0 mg cholesterol, 5 mg sodium.
Leftovers will keep in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
